count_semantics.design_commands_exact: exact unique design-vocabulary discriminator count; every member remains not_contract_admitted
count_semantics.current_hypothesis_required_commands: provisional classification only; may grow, shrink, or change after cohort, execution, ownership, and prerequisite resolution
count_semantics.current_hypothesis_outside_commands: provisional complement only; C5 and C8 make execution/materialization and recovery exclusions conditional
count_semantics.current_hypothesis_closed_payload_candid: current 44-name hypothesis only; membership may change
count_semantics.current_hypothesis_missing_payload_contr: current 44-name hypothesis only; not a final construction cardinality
count_semantics.current_hypothesis_command_contract_reco: current 44-name hypothesis only; no real command records exist
count_semantics.current_primary_event_name_union: unique catalog primary-event names under the disputed 44-command classification
count_semantics.current_kernel_cohort_event_name_union: unique currently named companion-event names; alternatives and producers are unresolved
count_semantics.current_event_conflict_union: upper-bound name union across mutually exclusive C1 resource branches under the current scope; not an exact required event set and not an event-occurrence count
count_semantics.current_event_conflict_union_members_mis: all members of the 52-name conflict union lack real EventContractRecords; final missing count follows the resolved event set
count_semantics.current_aggregate_hypotheses: provisional rows; C5/C8 can add aggregates and C7 can split or change reducer ownership
count_semantics.current_reducer_hypotheses_missing_recor: current aggregate hypothesis only; C7 makes the verification/reproducibility cardinality unresolved
count_semantics.current_owner_module_hypotheses: current scope only; execution or recovery ownership may enter after C5/C8
count_semantics.known_blocking_conflicts: exact count of currently enumerated conflicts C1-C8; additional review findings remain possible

machine_invariants.assertion: C1 resolution recomputes the event set; C5/C8 resolution recomputes command, payload, event, aggregate and module scope; C6 resolution freezes event occurrence cardinality; C7 resolution recomputes reducer ownership/cardinality
set(multi_grant_cardinality_conflict.commands_declaring_bounded_grants) == set(commands where scope_disposition == required_candidate and authority_profile == bounded_grants)
every conditional_scope_overrides.command_types member exists exactly once in commands and remains non-admitted until its conflict closes

bootstrap_domain.events: authority.assignment_recorded only; constitutional_bootstrap; no grant-use recursion

grant_domain.required_consumption_events: exactly one authority.grant_used per command-specific consumed grant
grant_domain.required_domain_events: the complete command-specific domain event set
grant_domain.required_exhaustion_events: exactly one authority.grant_exhausted for each and only each consumed grant whose final legal use occurred; zero-or-more
grant_domain.cardinality_and_order: finite and command-specific; unresolved until immutable CommandContractRecord

authority_lifecycle_c4.requirement: assignment-only nonrecursive authority plus exact grant/resource expiry/revoke race cohorts

run_measurement_c3.requirement: invalid run and no-valid-measurement must be atomic or globally fenced despite split producers

resource_observation_c1.requirement: choose exact resource.observed versus usage_observed/settled algebra and recompute the 52-name conflict union

local_execution_materialization_c5.requirement: before local analyzer byte visibility retain exact materialization intent, lease-equivalent exclusivity, sandbox capability, safety/execution grants, resource reservation and claim, execution start/completion, and observations
resolution_alternatives: closed specialized verifier-execution cohort with named legal producers
expand scope to required work/lease/attempt/materialization commands and aggregates

verification_start_resource.events: command-specific grant-use set+resource.reservation_claimed+verification.started+exact final-use exhaustion subset; C5 execution/materialization evidence still absent

claim_correction_c2.requirement: claim.superseded+dependency.invalidation_recorded atomic or formally fenced with one legal producer model, plus exact multi-grant use/exhaustion cardinality

reproducibility_ownership_c7.requirement: resolve catalog Reproducibility reducer versus candidate Verification reducer for reproducibility.determined without implying two canonical reducers for one aggregate

constitutional_recovery_prerequisite_c8.admission_boundary: separately admitted and machine-bound before the first mission command
constitutional_recovery_prerequisite_c8.requirement: exact registry graph, EngineContractRoot, C0 bundle, witnessed checkpoint, current RegistryActivation, and legal recovery/fork/quarantine frontier
constitutional_recovery_prerequisite_c8.fallback: expand first-slice command and aggregate scope if the prerequisite surface cannot supply the evidence

blocking_conflicts.summary: resource.record_observation maps to resource.observed while resource accounting requires usage_observed and possible settlement; reducer input set conflicts
claim supersession and dependency invalidation must be atomic but have different sole command producers
invalid-run and no-valid-measurement consequence must be atomic or fenced but have different command producers
bootstrap/maintenance authority must avoid recursive self-grants and resource reservation expiry/release/settlement producers and races are not exact

local analyzer execution lacks the required materialization intent, lease-equivalent exclusivity, sandbox capability, safety/execution grant, reservation/claim, and execution observation producer cohort
generic grant cohort is singular although bounded_grants commands require one grant-used event per consumed grant and exhaustion for the exact final-use subset
reproducibility.determined is mapped to reducer Reproducibility in the catalog but folded into Verification in this inventory
checkpoint, witness, registry activation, and recovery legality are asserted outside without a separately admitted machine-bound prerequisite dependency

conditional_scope_overrides.stay_outside_condition: a closed specialized verifier-execution cohort supplies the exact lease/materialization/sandbox/reservation/execution facts with legal producers
P0.constitutional-recovery-admission is separately admitted and machine-bound before the first mission command

multi_grant_cardinality_conflict.event_payload_cardinality: one grant_id per authority.grant_used or authority.grant_exhausted event
multi_grant_cardinality_conflict.required_rule: one grant-used event per consumed grant plus exhaustion events for exactly the final-use subset, with finite command-specific cardinality and order

obligation_profiles.mission_metadata: no source content authority; bind exact mission/protocol/evidence references
obligation_profiles.authority_only: no external effect; exact root/assignment/grant scope, controlled time, use and race state
obligation_profiles.data_governance: metadata before rights; exact rights/use/purpose/recipient/provider/region/retention; unknown denies
obligation_profiles.governed_local_bytes: C5 blocked: active exact DataUseDecision is necessary but not sufficient; require materialization intent, lease-equivalent exclusivity, sandbox capability, safety/execution grants, resource reservation/claim, and retained execution observations before byte visibility
obligation_profiles.science_local: active rights; exact protocol/method/estimand/units/missingness; no provider/model/network/external effect
obligation_profiles.resource_observation: exact multidimensional observation; unknown unavailable and unmeasured are never zero
obligation_profiles.verification_reserved: C5/C6 blocked: exact IV0-IV4 plus command-specific grant-use set, materialization/lease/sandbox execution evidence, resource reserve/claim/observe/settle, two separate clean environments, and zero external boundary
obligation_profiles.claim_truth: exact adjudication/verification/dependency frontier; required limitations; no publication authority
obligation_profiles.publication_outside: terminal boundary forbids publication and release
obligation_profiles.governed_exposure_outside: C5 conditional: no external recipient/provider/model boundary crossing, but a local materialization-intent producer remains mandatory
obligation_profiles.data_lifecycle_outside: no revocation/deletion/hold lifecycle exercised by the fixed fixtures
obligation_profiles.recovery_outside: C8 conditional: checkpoint/witness/activation/recovery commands may stay outside only behind separately admitted P0.constitutional-recovery-admission
obligation_profiles.scheduler_outside: C5 conditional: general work lease/attempt commands may stay outside only if a closed specialized verifier-execution cohort supplies equivalent materialization/sandbox/reservation/execution evidence
obligation_profiles.not_exercised_outside: command is not needed to represent the fixed fixture outcomes

aggregate_dependencies.catalog_evidence: COMMAND_EVENT_CATALOG maps reproducibility.determined to verification / Reproducibility while this inventory previously folded it into Verification

known_limitations: 121 design command names is the only frozen count; 44/77/43/52/23/10 are current hypothesis values only
the 52-event array is a C1 conflict union, not the exact dependency-closed event set or an event-occurrence count
C5 leaves local materialization, lease, sandbox, resource, and execution facts without a legal producer cohort
C6 leaves command-specific multi-grant use and exact final-use exhaustion cardinalities unresolved
C7 leaves reproducibility reducer ownership and therefore reducer cardinality unresolved
C8 leaves the separately admitted root/C0/checkpoint/witness/activation/recovery prerequisite unbound
authority_profile values are proposed closure targets, not admitted CommandContractRecord values
catalog event mappings are design evidence, not legal event alternatives
reducer family names are conceptual and are not reducer IDs; verification/reproducibility is explicitly contradictory
the mission phase versus general work-graph boundary must be fixed before admission; expanding it changes counts
schema validation cannot prove semantic references, producer cohorts, authority, rights, resources, or replay correctness
